title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Reliance Retail

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Reliance Retail
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Reliance Retail:
Reliance Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Retail!
